event.freeformPrompt: for the 3 points, i think they are too off the mark. im working on 3 things now - examining the impact of AI in delivering software products, exasminign how AI-enabled features can work and the 3rd one can be more learning in public rleated and sharing my understanding

element.textContent: Now · May 2026 I track emerging shifts, then build with them to understand what they change. Right now, that means AI. 01Putting GenAI into real workflows: PromptPal context, retrieval, and small agents that earn their keep.02Helping organisations adopt AI without losing judgement, dignity, or institutional memory.03Maker work in the open: the Bifrost caching plugin, Rootstock, and prototypes that test an idea cheaply.
element.outerHTML:
Now · May 2026

I track emerging shifts, then build with them to understand what they change. Right now, that means AI.

  1. 01Putting GenAI into real workflows: PromptPal context, retrieval, and small agents that earn their keep.
  2. 02Helping organisations adopt AI without losing judgement, dignity, or institutional memory.
  3. 03Maker work in the open: the Bifrost caching plugin, Rootstock, and prototypes that test an idea cheaply.
